payload.answer: The timing is ambiguous because “last Friday” and “next month” depend on the date this was said or recorded. Please clarify how you’d like to store it.
repair_options: Store as a quote with relative timing preserved: “Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.”
Clarify the exact date of “last Friday” and the exact month meant by “next month” before saving.
Store only the durable fact without exact timing: “Sam said he is leaving Goldman.”
